Maintenance

ATM Field Maintenance: Practical Checklist

Home/Blog/Article

Daily walkthrough (15 minutes)

Confirm normal noise signatures, look for unusual mist or drift outside the containment zone, verify pump suction conditions, and check that access gates and guards are latched. Photograph anything new—dates help service teams.

Weekly focus

Inspect strainers, verify flowmeter totals against production logs, and review chemical dosing consistency if antiscalant or pH conditioning is in service. Catch gradual drift before it becomes a weekend shutdown.

Nozzle and distribution paths

Follow the manufacturer schedule for inspection and cleaning. Partial blockages show up as uneven wetting patterns long before they show up as alarms. Always de-pressurize and lock out before hands-on work.

Seasonal items

Before monsoon, check drainage, lightning protection grounding, and roof-level handrails. Before peak summer, confirm motor cooling paths and bearing grease intervals.

When to call the OEM

Vibration step-changes, sustained high amp draw, or visible structural movement warrant a documented service visit rather than in-house experiments.

Asiatic Engineers service desk: +91 98240 54002.
